facts.claim: The Rolls-Royce Silver Spirit is a full-size luxury car produced by Rolls-Royce Motors, in Crewe, England, from 1980 to 1997.
The Silver Spur is a long-wheelbase version of the Silver Spirit, produced from 1980 to 2000.
It was the first car to feature a retractable Spirit of Ecstasy: the spring-loaded mascot sank into the radiator shell if dislodged from its position.
